author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
You CANNOT make this up.
Regular American @em72479 calls the Illinois DMV… and they casually admit they’re STILL letting non-English speakers take their CDL exams in Spanish — with interpreters (even family members) for the actual road skills test.
Meanwhile, we’ve got fresh headlines of CDL drivers plowing through road signs they can’t read, killing innocent people in Florida and elsewhere. 

USDOT just pointed to multiple fatal crashes caused by exactly this: truckers who don’t speak or read English. 5,500+ drivers have already lost privileges for failing basic English checks. People are dying because the system refuses to enforce common sense.

This video isn’t just a gotcha. It’s proof that everyday Americans providing tips — recording the call, dropping the receipts — is how we actually fix things.

Remember my interview exposing how the ICE tip line isn’t even monitored properly? Same story here. Citizens are handing the government gold-plated evidence on a platter… and the bureaucracy is too busy being “inclusive” to care.

If we actually listened to tips like this one, we’d save lives tomorrow.

Illinois: English is the language of our roads. Period. No more excuses.

Watch the video. Share it. Demand they stop.
The American people are doing the job the government won’t.
Bam.
#EnglishFirst #SafeRoads #CitizenPower
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
I am reposting this video because Nevadans need to see it.  I'm officially endorsing @DavidFlippoNV for Congress in NV-02. 

It’s time to vote out the weak Chamber of Commerce Republicans who are really here to keep the cheap illegal labor pipeline flowing — at taxpayer expense!

People like James Settelmeyer will sell you out for corporate profits every single time! Your wages, your schools, your hospitals, your quality of life? They don’t care. They’ll trade it all for a cheap workforce.

David Flippo is the real deal — a Trump Republican who puts America First, not profits first.June 9 primary. Vote like your future depends on it… because it does.#NV02 #MAGA🚨

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Steve Bannon nailed it.  The second you hire an illegal alien at “bargain” wages, the American taxpayer quietly picks up the tab for their healthcare, education, housing, food stamps, and emergency services.  That “savings” to the employer is just a hidden tax on you!

Center for Immigration Studies confirms it: Illegal immigrants create a lifetime net fiscal drain of ~$68,000 each (taxes paid minus services used).  RINOs and the cheap-labor lobby are both in on this scam — selling out the base for donor cash.  

Mass deportation isn’t cruelty — it’s basic math.  We’re done subsidizing their profits.  #DeportThemAll
tweets.text_resolved:
Steve Bannon nailed it.  The second you hire an illegal alien at “bargain” wages, the American taxpayer quietly picks up the tab for their healthcare, education, housing, food stamps, and emergency services.  That “savings” to the employer is just a hidden tax on you!

tweets.text:
Big thanks to the @NatPoliceAssoc for having me on the NPA Podcast — Part 1 is now live.
We cut straight through the noise and talked real border security, what’s actually happening on the line, and why the Mean Green Team’s proven tactics are exactly what this country needs right now.
No spin. No politics. Just the facts from 30 years on the front lines.
Watch it here and share it wide — Americans deserve the truth:

This is only Part 1. More to come.
The Mean Green Team isn’t just holding the line — we’re ready to finish the job
